title: Cthulhu Personality Test
subtitle: Lovecraft 12-Dimension Fate Assessment
description: Find your place in Cthulhu Mythos - Great Old One or crazy cultist?

questions.question: Late at night walking alone by the sea, you would most likely:

options.text: Listen to the waves and feel peaceful
Notice strange lights in the distance

questions.question: When you learn there are hidden truths in this world:

options.text: Fate is in my own hands
Fate is meant to be broken
I'm just a piece in the game

questions.question: If you discover a family member is hiding secrets:

options.text: It must be a great secret

questions.question: What would you do at the beach:

options.text: Feel uneasy but want to read

questions.question: If you could make one wish:

options.text: Star - symbol of reason and hope
Ocean - symbol of depth and unknown
Eye - symbol of observation and insight

AAAA.title: Rational Researcher
AAAA.description: You are a rational and calm researcher who believes science can explain everything. Though occasionally exposed to Cthulhu Mythos, you always keep a clear mind. You are suitable for academic research - maybe one day you'll uncover the truth of the universe. But beware, the more you know, the more dangerous it becomes.
AAAA.tips: Your rationality is your strength, but don't ignore warnings from your intuition

BBBB.title: Sensitive Artist
BBBB.description: You have a delicate soul and keen perception, often troubled by dreams and intuition. Your rich inner world makes you more susceptible to the madness of Cthulhu Mythos. Your artistic talent lets you see what others cannot - both blessing and curse.
BBBB.tips: Creation is your way to release pressure, but don't fall too deep

CCCC.title: Detached Outsider
CCCC.description: You maintain a cold distance from everything, as if separated from the world by an invisible wall. This protection shields you from madness but also makes it hard to connect with others. Like an observer, you watch the rise and fall of human civilization.
CCCC.tips: Moderate detachment is protection, excessive isolation hurts yourself

DDDD.title: Crazy Cultist
DDDD.description: You have crossed the line. When rationality collapsed, you saw the true universe - no meaning, no order, only endless chaos and terror. But in this madness, you gained unprecedented freedom. You have become part of the Great Old Ones.
DDDD.tips: You've seen the truth - only you know if it's blessing or curse

AABB.title: Innsmouth Descendant
AABB.description: Ancient curse flows in your blood. You appear normal on the surface, but every full moon you hear the sea calling. Your ancestors made a pact with the Deep Ones, and you are awakening. Time to face the fishy smell and scales.
AABB.tips: Your fate is written in your blood - accept or resist, the choice is yours

ABAB.title: Nyarlathotep Avatar
ABAB.description: You are like the Crawling Chaos - rational and humorous on the surface, but actually a faithful servant of the Great Old One. You excel at disguise and manipulation in human society. Your true form may be unknown even to yourself - but one day it will manifest.
ABAB.tips: You are both observer and participant, truth often surprises

BADD.title: Yog-Sothoth Disciple
BADD.description: Time and space are just illusions to you. You can perceive the overlap of past, present and future, as if standing outside of time. The cost of knowledge is sanity, but you no longer care. When you close your eyes, you see all of time and space - both blessing and curse.
BADD.tips: You've transcended mortal limitations, seeing ultimate truth

DADA.title: Azathoth Priest
DADA.description: On the throne of chaos, the unconscious drum beat never stops. You are the servant of the Blind Idiot God, playing mad melodies in dreams. The world is mere illusion; true reality can only be touched in complete destruction.
DADA.tips: You are part of cosmic chaos - destruction is rebirth

BDAB.title: Shub-Niggurath's Chosen
BDAB.description: The black breeding net is your birthplace. You are descendant of the Goat of a Thousand Young, possessing powerful vitality and reproductive ability. An ancient curse flows in your veins - your descendants will continue this mad legacy.
BDAB.tips: Your bloodline is both curse and power, use it wisely

ABBA.title: Cthulhu's Messenger
ABBA.description: In the depths of Atlantic, great Cthulhu lies sleeping. You are His messenger on earth, spreading knowledge about Him while waiting for the Great Awakening. When stars align, you will lead the new world. R'lyeh will rise from the ocean.
ABBA.tips: You are the bridge between Great One and human world, your mission is great

default.title: Wanderer in the Mist
default.description: You stand on the boundary between sanity and madness, confusedly exploring the meaning of existence. Cthulhu Mythos is still a blur to you, but the wheels of fate have started turning. Light or abyss ahead depends on your choice.
default.tips: You still have a choice - sanity or madness, it's your call
